title: Interactive OIDC Login for the Web UI — Implementation Plan
summary: Task-by-task implementation plan for adding OIDC Authorization Code + PKCE login to the SpecGraph web UI.
notes: This is an implementation plan (task list with file structure and step-by-step checkboxes), not a PRD/ADR/SPEC in the standard taxonomy sense. Closest fit is DOC (context/process artifact); the actual technical contract lives in the referenced design spec (docs/superpowers/specs/2026-06-12-oidc-interactive-ui-login-design.md), which should likely be classified as SPEC separately.
